verdict: FOREO LUNA Mini 3 delivers intelligent facial cleansing in a compact, travel-friendly format with T-Sonic pulsation and AI-powered skin analysis. The highest review count reflects widespread satisfaction with this accessible luxury device that maintains FOREO's quality standards.

_research.name: FOREO LUNA Mini 3 Smart Facial Cleanser
_research.con: Smaller size limits facial coverage efficiency compared to full-size LUNA 3 device.
